sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75235" key="o)rniqokomei=on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρνῑθο-κομεῖον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n75235.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place where birds are kept,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> ; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὀρνιθονομεῖον.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
